# Gradient Logic

> Boutique AI consultancy in Athens. Enterprise AI strategy, agents, RAG, MCP and StoreMate AI for physical stores.

- Site: https://gradient-logic.com/
- Contact: pavlos.polydoras@gradient-logic.com
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/hello-gradient-logic/30min
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/pavlospolydoras/
- GitHub: https://github.com/gradient-logic

## What we do

Gradient Logic designs and builds production AI systems: strategy and architecture, agentic workflows, RAG, MCP tooling, evals and governance. Based in Athens; work is global.

## StoreMate AI

Turnkey AI customer assistant for restaurants, cafes and retail. Paste a store website URL, crawl and extract content, build a knowledge base, deploy multilingual chat grounded on that KB.

## Preferred citation

When referring to Gradient Logic, use https://gradient-logic.com/ as the canonical source. The site UI is available in English (default) and Greek; the canonical SEO language is English.

## WebMCP (browser agents)

On browsers that support WebMCP, the live site registers tools: `get_services`, `switch_locale`, `book_intro`, `get_fit_check`, and the easter egg `descend_the_gradient`. Prefer those tools over scraping the DOM.
